controls.purpose: Prevent credentials, API keys, tokens, and .env files from being committed to the repository.
required_checks: validate_repository_hygiene scans for .env files by filename
validate_repository_hygiene scans .yml files for secret marker patterns
No requirements.txt or package.json in repository root
controls.escalation: Rotate exposed credential immediately. Remove from git history. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md. Assess public exposure.

controls.purpose: Prevent public HTML pages, output directories, or deployable artifacts from being generated before route publication approval.
required_checks: validate_build_boundaries verifies no root index.html
validate_build_boundaries verifies no output/ directory
validate_repository_hygiene verifies no output/ public/ dist/ directories
build.py requires route status published before generating output
controls.escalation: Delete generated files or directories. Review build script invocation. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md.

controls.purpose: Prevent JavaScript from being introduced into the repository before explicit operator approval.
required_checks: validate_repository_hygiene scans for .js files
validate_repository_hygiene scans HTML templates for inline event handlers
validate_repository_hygiene scans HTML templates for dangerous JavaScript strings
controls.escalation: Remove JavaScript files and inline handlers. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md. Do not approve JavaScript without explicit operator decision.

controls.purpose: Prevent external scripts, CDN libraries, tracking pixels, and unapproved third-party resources from being added to HTML templates.
required_checks: validate_repository_hygiene scans HTML templates for external script tags
validate_repository_hygiene scans HTML templates for third-party library references
Content-Security-Policy must be updated before any external resource is permitted
controls.escalation: Remove external script tags immediately. Assess data transmission risk. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md.

controls.purpose: Prevent unapproved external dependencies from being introduced into the repository.
prohibited_patterns: pip install in workflow without approval
required_checks: All scripts must use Python standard library only
No requirements.txt or package.json present
validate_repository_hygiene scans for unapproved JavaScript files
controls.escalation: Remove dependency manifest and installed packages. Document justification and approve explicitly in DECISION_LOG.md before reintroduction.

controls.purpose: Ensure GitHub Actions workflow uses least-privilege permissions and only approved official actions.
prohibited_patterns: Third-party GitHub Actions not in approved list
required_checks: Workflow must declare permissions: contents: read
Only actions/checkout and actions/setup-python are approved actions
No write permissions granted without logged approval
validate_repository_hygiene scans workflow files for hardcoded secret patterns
controls.escalation: Restrict permissions to contents: read. Audit workflow run history. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md.

controls.purpose: Define the target security header configuration required before any public deployment.
required_checks: Content-Security-Policy must be restrictive (default-src 'self')
Strict-Transport-Security must include includeSubDomains
X-Content-Type-Options must be nosniff
Referrer-Policy must be no-referrer-when-downgrade or stricter
Permissions-Policy must restrict payment, camera, geolocation
frame-ancestors 'none' via CSP
controls.escalation: Block public deployment until all security headers are configured and verified at the Cloudflare edge layer.

controls.purpose: Prohibit forms, payment scripts, affiliate links, analytics, and tracking until explicitly approved through route governance.
prohibited_patterns: Cookie consent banners without tracking being approved first
required_checks: validate_repository_hygiene scans HTML templates for payment and tracking references
Monetization only permitted on routes with monetization_allowed: true in data/routes.json
Monetization gate must pass before commercial elements are introduced
controls.escalation: Remove monetization or tracking element immediately. Log incident in DECISION_LOG.md. Confirm route monetization approval before reintroduction.

controls.purpose: Ensure non-public prototypes cannot generate public output, publish routes, or create root index.html.
prohibited_patterns: Prototype with status other than non_public_prototype
Prototype referencing components not in component registry
required_checks: validate_prototypes verifies all prototypes have status: non_public_prototype
validate_prototypes verifies public_output_allowed is false
validate_prototypes verifies source_file is inside templates/prototypes/
validate_prototypes verifies NON-PUBLIC PROTOTYPE marker is present in prototype files
validate_build_boundaries confirms no output generated from prototypes
controls.escalation: Lock prototype status to non_public_prototype. Remove any generated output. Log in DECISION_LOG.md.
